summary: Comprehensive backend testing of BILL4PE completed. All 26 pytest cases passed (100% success). Covered: health, auth (register/login/me/duplicate/invalid), JWT enforcement on protected endpoints, wallet (initial ₹50 bonus, recharge with limits, txn history), expenses (create/get/list/filters/stats), bill generation (₹5 deduction, idempotency, 402 on insufficient balance), PDF download (Bearer header + ?token= query), AI detect-items (Gemini 3 Flash with real Indian food image returned valid items), AI suggest-items (best-effort), and contact form (valid + 422 on bad email).

minor.issue: EmailStr rejects reserved TLDs like .test (HTTP 422). Acceptable behaviour but worth documenting — users with test/example/invalid TLDs cannot register. Tests now use .com domain.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 572 lines - approaching 700 line threshold. Consider splitting into modules (auth.py, expenses.py, bills.py, ai.py, pdf_builder.py) before adding more features.
JWT_SECRET has a default fallback 'dev-secret' in server.py line 37 - good that .env sets it, but a missing env var should ideally fail fast in production.
PDF endpoint accepts JWT via ?token= query param - convenient for browser download links but tokens may leak via referer headers/server logs. Consider short-lived signed download URLs for production.
AI detect-items: 8MB cap and MIME normalization is correct. JSON fence-stripping is robust. Gemini returns sensible items (verified with real thali image).

Bill generation correctly idempotent and atomic for the wallet-fee debit; balance is updated before expense flag is set - small race window if two simultaneous requests, but DB lookup of bill_generated flag mitigates the duplicate charge risk.
Wallet recharge max ₹10,000 per txn enforced. No daily/monthly cap (mock recharge - acceptable for MVP).
All endpoints exclude MongoDB _id consistently. Good.
All endpoints use async/await properly. Good.
test_credentials: Tests register fresh users each run with @bill4pe-qa.com domain (UUID-based emails). No shared credentials. /app/memory/test_credentials.md is empty (no admin/seed users in this app).
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Each test run creates 2-3 fresh users + a handful of expenses/bills/wallet txns/contact-messages. Data is left in DB (no destructive cleanup) - safe due to unique UUID emails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_bill4pe.py is reusable as regression suite. Image fixture at /tmp/thali.jpg (download from unsplash if missing - URL in original test setup). Use @bill4pe-qa.com or other real TLDs for emails (EmailStr blocks .test/.invalid/.example reserved TLDs). EMERGENT_LLM_KEY works with gemini-3-flash-preview. PDF endpoint accepts BOTH Bearer header and ?token= query param.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found. Only test setup issue: EmailStr from pydantic+email-validator now rejects RFC 2606 reserved TLDs (.test, .example, .invalid, .localhost). Resolved by using @bill4pe-qa.com in tests.
